Created by Magus, Asrack, Spectro, and Azriath, this was a huge hit with many people apparntly.
[[File:Amafront.jpg]]

Azriath - Buttons, Header, Background.
Asrack - GFX And ideas.
Magus - Background, colors.
Spectrumfire - Worm, Team Buttons.

[[Category:Frontend]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721212437/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/AMA_Frontend -->
